meaning: adj.强迫人的,突出的,鲁莽的,令人厌恶的,过分炫耀的
examples: The sofa would be less obtrusive in a paler colour.
They tried to ensure that their presence was not too obtrusive.
These heaters are less obtrusive and are easy to store away in the summer.
On several occasions she has been urged to retreat behind more obtrusive layers of security.
The media has taken some flak in recent months for being shallow, inaccurate and sometimes damagingly obtrusive.
